groups.thesis: Sector under pressure with avg YTD return of -12.1%. Weak breadth — just 0/5 stocks outperforming S&P 500. Only 40% above 50-day MA, trend weakening. Healthy momentum (avg RSI 53).
groups.thesis_breaker: S&P 500 correction below 6433 (10% off 7148 high). Momentum breakdown if avg RSI drops below 40 (currently 53). Trend weakening — 3/5 (60%) already below 50-day MA, critical if >50%. Group leadership fragile (avg YTD -12.1%), at risk of turning negative.
